text: Expose non-interactive self-documenting INGEST operations that an AI Agent Host can invoke safely.
target: Preview, inspect, commit, resume, status, abandon, and cleanup operations provide versioned machine-readable schemas, one structured stdout result, stable module-scoped errors and exit codes, and diagnostics containing no financial payloads. Evidence: analogous — the validated LEDGER AI Agent Host dependency, FR-LEDGER-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION, and UC-INGEST-006.
